title: Tender run order: framework first → recent spokes → hub last
summary: sort_wheels() pins wheelwright-framework at position 1, wheelwright-hub at last, all other active spokes sorted by last_updated descending. Ensures teachings propagate from framework outward before hub aggregates.
why_it_matters: Without this order, hub may process sessions before framework teachings are generated, causing spokes to receive stale or incomplete teaching sets.
pattern: sort_wheels(wheels) = framework + sorted(rest, key=last_updated, reverse=True) + hub
